name: Richard Rodney Bennett
abstract: Sir Richard Rodney Bennett  (29 March 1936 – 24 December 2012) was an English composer and pianist. He was noted for his musical versatility, drawing from such sources as jazz, romanticism, and avant-garde; and for his use of twelve-tone technique and serialism.

works.t: Sonata for Oboe and Continuo in G Minor, TWV 41:g6
3 Sondheim Waltzes for Oboe and Piano
Sonata for Oboe and Piano, FP 185
Four Two-Piano Fantasies on Gershwin Songs

about_quotes.speaker: Mandel Johnny
about_quotes.evidence: Richard Rodney Bennett sent me a lyric he had written... I just wrote the song from the lyric
